programme.desc: The Louisville Kings host the Dallas Renegades for a UFL matchup at Lynn Family Stadium. Louisville secured a 47-25 victory over Dallas during their April game as the Renegades' running back Ellis Merriweather enters with four rushing touchdowns.

programme.title: Live: MLS Soccer
